title: barleria involucrata var. elata
intro: Barleria involucrata var. elata, also known as the 'Tall Buttonbush', is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Barleria involucrata var. elata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction by boiling its leaves and stems in water to create a tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
